NONEX_IST_OD6S.ACTION_ONLY_ONE: Only one of this type of action is necessary/available.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ACTION_TOOLTIP: Click to roll action, or drag to Actions list
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ALREADY_ADVANCED: Only one pip advance allowed per session.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ALREADY_CREW: Actor is already a vehicle crew member.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_ALL_OUT_DESCRIPTIO: The character attacks with no thought to the consequences. This maneuver increases the chance of the character striking the target, but, in that round, the attacker cannot perform any other action at all — not even to actively defend.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_GRAB_DESCRIPTION: The attacker physically grasps a target. Few melee weapons allow this option, so it is used generally only in brawling attacks. What effect this has on the target depends on the type of grab. (The ones listed here are choke, flip, hold, slam/throw, and arm pin.) See the escape rules in this chapter for details on getting out of grabs. On subsequent rounds of a grab, attackers who defeat an escape attempt or against a defender who chooses not to resist may do their Strength Damage only (no modifiers except those from Special Abilities or equipment). Some grab variations may offer other options.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_KNOCKDOWN_TRIP_DES: Using brawling or a blunt melee weapon in the usual way, the attacker causes his target to stumble and, instead of taking damage, the opponent loses 2D from her next Reflexes or Reflexes-based skill roll. If this is a knockdown or trip attempt, she must also spend one action to stand up again. Generally, unless the character has special training, he may only knockdown or push a character whose Physique (including Special Abilities or Disadvantage modifiers) is equal to or less than his own.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_LUNGE_DESCRIPTION: The character takes a step forward to jab at an opponent, usually with an edged weapon. This adds about a half-meter (more or less depending on the stride) to the range of the attack, but it lowers the effectiveness of the attack.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_PUSH_DESCRIPTION: Using brawling or a blunt melee weapon in the usual way, the attacker causes his target to stumble and, instead of taking damage, the opponent loses 2D from her next Reflexes or Reflexes-based skill roll. If this is a knockdown or trip attempt, she must also spend one action to stand up again. Generally, unless the character has special training, he may only knockdown or push a character whose Physique (including Special Abilities or Disadvantage modifiers) is equal to or less than his own.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_RANGED_BURST_FIRE_: A character may perform this attack only with a weapon capable of burst fire (like an assault rifle) and switching to single fire. The firer fires only one shot instead of a burst; it is primarily used to conserve ammunition.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_RANGED_FULL_AUTO_D: This attack is only possible with weapons that can fire at fully automatic settings (such as assault rifles, sub-machine guns, and machine guns). Since the character is taking quite a bit of time to “hold down the trigger” and pump ammo into the air, the extra “to hit” and “damage” bonuses are somewhat compensated for by the modifier to the character’s defensive value during the round he is performing a full auto attack.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_RANGED_SINGLE_FIRE: The character fires a weapon (such as a pistol) several times in a round at the same target. Characters may use this option only when a weapon automatically reloads itself after firing a single shot or when it is fairly easy to ready it for firing again (such as a .45 automatic, which puts a new cartridge in the slide as soon as the first one clears the barrel). It increases the character’s chance to hit a target, as well as the damage. It does not count as a multi-action as long as the shot is taken at the same target. One target, one die roll, one damage total.
Single fire as multi (-1D/+1D per shot)
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_RANGED_SWEEP_DESCR: The character wants to “spray an area” with ammo. Only characters with weapons that go full auto, burst, or single fire as multi (in general, just about any automatic weapon) can perform this maneuver. The gun uses the amount of ammunition needed by whichever setting is used. They gain a positive modifier to hit (because of the sheer volume of shots), but this “non-targeted” attack results in a lower damage total.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_SWEEP_DESCRIPTION: These attacks, usually foot sweeps or roundhouses, are used when the character wants to make certain she hits the target, regardless of how much injury is caused.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ATTACK_TACKLE_DESCRIPTION: Tackling is much like grabbing, except that the attacker seeks to overcome the target entirely. Characters may perform this with brawling only. If successful or the target chooses not to struggle, the character captures the target and may, if desired, do normal damage. The target, meanwhile, may make no other actions than attempt to escape (see the escape rules herein). On subsequent rounds, the attacker may choose to do her Strength Damage only (no modifiers).
NONEX_IST_OD6S.BODY_POINTS_MAX: Maximum - Must be in "Free Edit" mode to change
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ACTIVE_ATTRIBUTES_: Unchecking an attribute will deactivate it, hiding it from character sheets.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ATTRIBUTES_SORTING: Sorting of attribute display on Actor sheets, left->right->next row, repeat
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RANGED_ATTACK_DIFF: Set the base ranged attack difficulty number, default 10.  Has no effect if Rules Options for using difficulty levels are set.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_MELEE_ATTACK_DIFFI: Set the base melee attack difficulty number, default 10 (reduced by 5 during rolls due to point blank range). Has no effect if Rules Options for using difficulty levels are set.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_BRAWL_ATTACK_DIFFI: Set the base brawl attack difficulty number, default 10 (reduced by 5 during rolls due to point blank range). Has no effect if Rules Options for using difficulty levels are set.
Set the brawl attack difficulty level - only relevant if 'Melee Weapons Have Difficulty' is set under 'Rules Options'
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ATTRIBUTE_ACTIVE_D: Unchecking this box will hide the attribute
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_EXPLOSIVE_DES: If checked the system will prompt for template placement, auto-target tokens inside the template, and handle timers
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_INCAPACITATED: When an actor's wound level becomes 'Incapacitated' auto-roll a check to remain concious.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_ARMOR_DAMAGE_: When an Character or NPC takes damage and Weapon/Armor Damage is set in Rules Options damage will be automatically applied to the equipped armor of the target.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_OPPOSED_DESCR: Automatically generate an opposed damage roll when an NPC/Creature is targeted by a player, and handle damage result automatically.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_PROMPT_PLAYER: When checked players will get prompted for a resistance roll when damaged.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_INCAPACITATED: When an actor's wound level becomes 'Incapacitated' auto-roll a check to remain concious.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_MORTALLY_WOUN: When an actor is Mortally Wounded auto-roll a mortal wound check at the end of each round.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_SKILL_USED_DE: Automatically check the "Used" checkbox for a skill/specialization when it is rolled.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_AUTO_STATUS_DESCRI: Automatically apply status conditions to tokens (Stunned, Wounded, etc.)
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_BRAWL_ATTRIBUTE_DE: Set the attribute to use for brawling attacks.  Note that this only affects unskilled rolls.  You should configure a custom Brawl skill item with the attribute you choose as well.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINT_ME: Set maximum character point usages per roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINTS_A: Maximum character points allowed for an Attribute roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINTS_B: Maximum character points allowed for a Block roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINTS_D: Maximum character points allowed for a Dodge roll.
Maximum character points allowed for a Damage Resistance roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINTS_I: Maximum character points allowed for an Initiative roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINTS_P: Maximum character points allowed for a Parry roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHARACTER_POINTS_S: Maximum character points allowed for a Skill roll.
Maximum character points allowed for a Specialization roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_CA1_NAME: Customize the name of Custom Attrbute One
Customize the short name of Custom Attrbute One
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_CA2_NAME: Customize the name of Custom Attrbute Two

Customize the short name of Custom Attrbute Three
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_CA4_NAME: Customize the name of Custom Attrbute Four
Customize the short name of Custom Attrbute Four
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SCALE_WOUNDS_DESCR: Scale Wounds as per older editions of WEG games. See the System Settings page on the project wiki for details.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SCALE_STUN_DESCRIP: Scale Stuns as per older editions of WEG games. See the System Settings page on the project wiki for details.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SPEC_LINK_DESCRIPT: If checked, advancing a base skill will also advance any specializations
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_COST_COST: Use Currency on actor sheet and for item prices (Credits by default).
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_COST_DESCRIPTION: Use either OpenD6-Space's method of rolling Funds against Price to see if a Character can purchase and item, or use a straight Currency value.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_COST_PRICE: Show Funds on the actor sheet and use for purchasing.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CURRENCY_LABEL_DES: Customize the name of currency in your world (default 'Credits')

NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_AGILITY_: Change the name of the Agility attribute to something else.
Change the short name of Agility (Agi) to something else.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_BODY_POI: Set a custom name for Body Points, such as "Hit Points".
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_CURRENCY: Customize the name of the currency in your game, e.g. 'Dollars' instead of 'Credits'.

NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_KNOWLEDG: Change the name of the Knowledge attribute to something else.
Change the short name of Knowledge (Kno) to something else.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_MANIFEST: Customize the name of Manifestation (singular) for your game.
Customize the name of Manifestations for your game.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_MECHANIC: Change the name of the Mechanical attribute to something else.
Change the short name of Mechanical (Mec) to something else.

NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_PERCEPTI: Change the name of the Perception attribute to something else.

NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_SPECIES_: Customize the Species Label on Actor sheets
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_STARSHIP: Set a custom name for the starship Toughness attribute
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_STRENGTH: Change the name of the Strength attribute to something else.
Change the short name of Strength (Str) to something else.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_TECHNICA: Change the name of the Technical attribute to something else.
Change the short name of Technical (Tec) to something else.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_TYPE_LAB: Customize the Type Label on Actor sheets
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_USE_FATE: Customize the phrase 'Use a fate point?' on roll dialogues to match your custom Fate Points name.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOMIZE_VEHICLE_: Set a custom name for the vehicle Toughness attribute
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CUSTOM_LABELS_DESC: Configure custom labels for attributes, etc. for your game world.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEADLINESS_1: Least deadly - three levels of wounded.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEADLINESS_2: Less deadly, two levels of wounded.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEADLINESS_5: Even deadlier, two less wound levels
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEADLINESS_DESCRIP: Deadliness level. Lower settings allow more damage before death, higher levels less
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEADLINESS_MENU_DE: Set deadliness settings for Characters and NPCs.  Changes here will have no effect if Body Points are used under the "Rules Options" section.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEFAULT_UNKNOWN_DI: If checked 'Unknown' will be the default difficulty on all rolls and will need to be handled on the chat message when rolled.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DEFENSE_LOCK_DESCR: If selected, Dodge can only be used against ranged weapons, Parry against melee weapons, and Block against a brawl attack
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DICE_FOR_SCALE_DES: Older D6 systems added dice for scale modifiers.  Check here to use that method.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_DIFFICULTY_MENU_DE: Configure default target numbers for levels of difficulty.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_EXPLOSIVE_END_OF_R: If selected, explosives detonate at the end of the round rather than the actor's turn.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_EXPLOSIVE_ZONES_DE: If checked, explosives will have 4 radius zones instead of 3
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FAST_COMBAT_DESCRI: Existing damage effects are only applied in the first round.  No additional damage effects are applied until after combat ends.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FATE_POINT_CLIMACT: Fate point usage is always climactic and affects all rolls in an actor's turn.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FATE_POINT_ROUND_D: If selected, fate point effects stop at the end of the round, rather than the start of the character's next turn.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FATE_POINT_ROUND: Fate Point Clear at End of Round
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STATIC_STR_RANGE_D: When a weapon has STR as part of its range use a fixed value (4*D+pips) instead of rolling.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FLAT_SKILLS_DESCRI: Skills provide a flat bonus instead of dice.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FUNDS_FATE: Allow Fate Points on Funds Rolls
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_FUNDS_FATE_DESCRIP: If selected and Funds are used, characters can use Fate Points or Character Points to modify Funds rolls.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_GRENADE_DAMAGE_DIC: Use dice for blast radius damage instead of a proportion of the rolled damage.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIDE_ADVANTAGES_DI: Do not use advantages or disadvantages in the system.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIDE_EXPLOSIVE_TEM: If checked, only the GM and the player who set/threw an explosive will see the blast template until detonation.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIDE_ATTACK_ROLLS_: If selected, all attack rolls will be hidden as above
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHAT_COLOR_PUBLIC_: Accent color used for public rolls. Default is the system gold accent.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHAT_COLOR_SELF_DE: Accent color used for self-rolls (visible only to you). Choose a hue that stands apart from your GM-roll and hidden-roll colors.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHAT_COLOR_GM_DESC: Accent color used for rolls whispered to the GM (/gmroll).
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHAT_COLOR_BLIND_D: Accent color used for hidden rolls (/blindroll). A neutral grey is the default for legibility over busy maps.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_CHAT_BACKGROUND_OP: Multiplier applied to chat-message backgrounds. 0 fades the cards to fully transparent (useful over busy maps), 1 is the designed default, higher values darken them. Independent from the sheet opacity slider.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIDE_COMPENDIA_DES: Hide system compendia to cut down on clutter when using your own compendia.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIDE_GM_ROLLS_DESC: Automatically hide rolls (/gmroll) made by the GM made from character sheets
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIDE_SKILL_ROLLS_D: If selected, the system will not show difficulties or success of skill rolls until the GM reveals the card.  If not selected, it will only hide data when the difficulty is selected as 'Unknown'.  This gives the GM the opportunity to withhold information until the player decides whether or not to use a character point post-roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIGHLIGHT_EFFECTS_: Provide a green or red highlight to Attribute, Skill or Specialization scores that have been modified by an active effect.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_BLOCK_SHEET_POINTE: Block sheet clicks from reaching the canvas

Stops mousedown events that originate on a sheet or dialog from bubbling up to window-level listeners. Workaround for the `Pings` module (and similar) firing a canvas ping when you long-click on a character sheet under Foundry v14, where sheets mount to document.body and aren't seen as 'over the UI' by those modules. Enable only if you have a misbehaving module of this shape.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIAL_ATTRIBUTES: The total number of attribute pips available on character creation
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIAL_CHARACTER_: Starting Character Points for new characters
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIAL_FATE_POINT: Starting Fate Points for new characters
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIAL_SKILLS_DES: The total number of skill pips available on character creation
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIATIVE_2: Each character rolls perception once at the start of combat.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIATIVE_3: Each character rolls perception every round.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIATIVE_4: No rolls, use scores to determine initiative order.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIATIVE_ATTRIBU: Select which attribute initiative rolls should use.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIATIVE_AUTO_DS: Do not show Dice So Nice animations (if installed) for automatic initiative rolls
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INITIATIVE_AUTO_RE: Automatically reroll Character initiative each round
Automatically reroll NPC initiative each round
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_INTERSTELLAR_DRIVE: Change the name of Interstellar Drive to something suitable for your game.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_MAP_RANGE_TO_DIFFI: Instead of using a flat difficulty of 10 with range modifiers, use VE/E/M/D for PB/S/M/L ranges.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_MELEE_DIFFICULTY_D: Instead of melee weapons having a default attack of 5 with difficulty modifiers use a Difficulty level for the item.  This will also make brawl attacks use a difficulty of Very Easy.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_MELEE_RANGE_DESCRI: If checked a token must be adjacent to another token to attack it with melee or brawl attacks
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_METAPHYSICS_ATTRIB: Only use the Metaphysics Skills and not the attribute
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_PARRY_SKILLS_DESCR: If checked, the system will use a separate 'Melee Parry' and 'Brawling Parry' skill instead of the base Melee Combat/Brawling skill.  This skill will need to be created as an item or exist in a compendium
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_PASSENGER_DAMAGE_D: Use dice for passenger damage instead of a proportion of vehicle damage.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_PIP_PER_DICE_DESCR: Number of pips needed to create a new dice to roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RANDOM_DICE_DIFFIC: If 'Random Difficulty' is selected along with this option the system will use dice rolls for difficulty instead of a range between the previous difficulty.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RANDOM_DIFFICULTY_: For each roll a random difficulty between the previous difficulty and the difficulty for the selected level will be generated.
Number of dice to roll for Very Easy difficulty (if 'Dice Random Difficulty' is selected.
Number of dice to roll for Easy difficulty
Number of dice to roll for Moderate difficulty
Number of dice to roll for Difficult difficulty
Number of dice to roll Very Difficult difficulty
Number of dice to roll for Heroic difficulty
Number of dice to roll for Legendary difficulty
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RANDOM_HIT_LOCATIO: When checked the system will generate a hit location on every roll based on the last digit of the attack roll.  This will only apply to attacks if the rule option for using difficulty levels for attacks is also selected.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_REACTION_SKILLS_DE: Dodge/Parry/Block become reaction skills that can be used any time in a round and reset at the end of the round instead of at the start of the player's next turn
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_REVEAL_MENU_DESCRI: Options for hiding and revealing difficulty, success, etc. on rolls
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RULES_OPTIONS_MENU: Options for different style of rules regarding roll handling, modifiers, etc.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SKILL_USED_DESCRIP: Only allow skills to advance if they have been used in an adventure.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STUN_DICE_DESCRIPT: When a stun weapon attack succeeds, use 2D6 for the number of minutes the target becomes unconscious instead of the difference in Damage vs. Resistance rolls.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SHOW_DIFFICULTY_DR: If checked a Difficulty dropdown menu is present on roll dialogs.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SHOW_METAPHYSICS_A: If selected the Metaphysics Attribute and/or Skills will be shown on the Attributes tab, but only if 'Do not use Metaphysics Attribute' under 'Rules Options is not selected.'
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SHOW_MODIFIERS_DES: Show common difficulty/modifier options on roll dialogs
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SHEET_BACKGROUND_O: Multiplier applied to the actor/item sheet background. 0 fades the sheet to fully transparent, 1 is the designed default, higher values progressively darken it (the bottom of the gradient saturates around 1.8). Useful for adapting sheets to busy maps — low over a starfield, high over a jungle.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SHOW_SKILL_SPECIAL: Show the base Skill for a Specialization when rolling specializations in the roll dialog and the chat log.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_SPECIALIZATION_DIC: At character creation allow only 3 separate specializations of 1D each.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STRENGTH_DAMAGE_DE: Use Strength for damage instead of the standard OpenD6 Strength Modifier
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STUN_DAMAGE_INCREM: A Stunned wound level will increase the actor's wound level.  In older systems a Stunned result did not increase the actor's Wound level, and a Mortally Wounded character could only be killed by Incapacitated or higher
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_TRACK_STUNS_DESCRI: Track the number of stuns the actor has received.  Reset by clicking the value.  This will also trigger an automatic roll for the number of minutes the actor will become unconscious once enough stuns have been received.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_USE_BODY_DESCRIPTI: Optional rule settings allowing the use of wound levels, body points and wound levels, or just body points.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_USE_STRENGTH_BRAWL: Use the Strength Attribute instead of Agility for Brawling skills.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_USE_WEAPON_ARMOR_D: If selected Weapons and Armor can be damaged, with penalties.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_USE_WILD_DIE_DESCR: Certain older D6 systems did not use the Wild Die.  Uncheck this to disable it. This will hide the wild die on all rolls
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_USE_WOUNDS_WITH_BO: Use Body Points and Wound levels.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_VEHICLE_DIFFICULTY: If checked, use the vehicle's speed for the base difficulty for movement.  Otherwise terrain difficulty will be used.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_0: Standard behavior, choose the result in the chat card
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_HANDLE_0: Automatically apply the default wild die one choice
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_HANDLE_1: Set the dialog to the default wild die one choice
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_ONE_DESCR: Default behavior of the wild die when it rolls a one.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_ONE_FACE: Custom One Face for Wild Die
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_ONE_FACE_: Set a custom image for the 'one' face of the wild die.  Must be 256x256.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_ONE_HANDL: If wild die behavior is set, how to apply it
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_SIX_FACE: Custom Six Face for Wild Die
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_WILD_DIE_SIX_FACE_: Set a custom image for the 'six' face of the wild die.  Must be 256x256.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIRM_ROLL_BODYPOINTS: This roll will replace the maximum value.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIRM_SPECIES_TEMPLATE_: Warning: This will clear the species name and Special Abilities.  Are you sure you want to do this?
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIRM_TEMPLATE_CLEAR: Warning: This will reset the character to all default attributes/skills/inventory/etc.  Are you sure you want to do this?
NONEX_IST_OD6S.COVER_FULL_DESCRIPTION: Full Cover - target cannot be hit if the cover offers protection,  but damage done to the cover might exceed the Armor Value it gives the target, and, indirectly, the target receives damage. Most of the time, the attacker must eliminate the cover before having a chance to hit the target
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CREATE_CHARACTER_1A: Select a template from the list below. If you select 'Custom' ask your GM what the limitations are.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CREATE_CHARACTER_2A: Use the +/- button to add/subtract pips/dice to your skills, and the '<' button to add specializations. Consult your gamemaster for the rules pertaining to specializations
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CREATE_CHARACTER_2B: Use the + button next to the attributes to add any additional skills per your systems rules.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CREATE_CHARACTER_2C: Your remaining attribute and specialization dice are shown.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you wish to delete this?
NONEX_IST_OD6S.DOES_NOT_POSSESS_SKILL: This actor does not possess the requisite skill for this specialization.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.EMBEDDED_PILOT_DESCRIPTIO: When checked, an actor can be dragged to this ship and the attributes/skills/etc. will be copied, allowing the GM to drag out multiple tokens without the need to assign a pilot.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ERROR_SPECIES_TEMPLATE_AL: This character has already been assigned a species template
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ERROR_TEMPLATE_ALREADY_AS: This character has already been assigned a character template.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.ERR_SPECIALIZATION_EXISTS: A specialization with this name already exists.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.EXPLOSIVE_CONTACT_DESC: If checked, timer will be disabled and the explosive will detonate on contact
NONEX_IST_OD6S.EXPLOSIVE_TIMER_THROWN_DE: Sets the explosive timer; 0 will detonte this round.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.FULL_DEFENSE_DESCRIPTION: A character who foregoes all of her actions for a round to completely protect herself from attacks makes a full defense. The total rolled by the skill plus 10 takes the place of the base combat difficulty from the time the character makes the full defense on her turn to her turn in the next round.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.HEAD: Head
NONEX_IST_OD6S.LABEL: Label
NONEX_IST_OD6S.MODIFIERS_DESCRIPTION: Modifiers will be added or subtracted to the target difficulty of the roll
NONEX_IST_OD6S.NAME: Name
NONEX_IST_OD6S.NOT_ENOUGH_CP_ADVANCE: Not enough Character Points to advance.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.NOT_ENOUGH_CP_ROLL: Not enough Character Points to spend on this roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.NOT_ENOUGH_CP_SPEC: Not enough character points to create specialization.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.NPC_CP_ROLL: NPCs do not have character points for rolls.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.PURCHASE_SUGGESTED_MODIFI:
Price Difficulties

Cost of Item or Service Level

Cheap (several credits or less) Very Easy (VE)

Inexpensive (less than 200 credits) Easy (E)

Nominally expensive (hundreds of credits) Moderate (M)

Somewhat expensive (a few thousand credits) Difficult (D)

Expensive (several thousand credits) Very Difficult (VD)

Very Expensive (tens of thousands of credits) Heroic (H)

Costly* (a few hundred thousand credits) Legendary (L)

*“Costly” is hardly the top end, and Game Masters should continue adding to the difficulty for higher prices.

Item or Service Is… Minimum Modifier

Common; average quality 0

Very common; local market is flooded; of slightly lower technological complexity than commonly available -5

In high demand; limited availability; of slightly higher technological complexity than commonly available +5

Not generally available to the public; of significantly higher technological complexity than commonly available +15

Out of season or from a distant location +15 or more

Unusually high quality +5

Damaged or low quality -5

Relationship with Seller Bargain Modifier

Has dealt with rarely or never 0

Pays on time; frequent customer; no complaints by seller -1 or more

Rarely pays on time; problem buyer +1 or more
NONEX_IST_OD6S.REQUIRES_ROLL: Requires a successful roll to activate
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESIST_MORTALLY_WOUNDED: Resist Dying from a Mortal Wound
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESULT_GOOD_DESCRIPTION: The results were better than necessary and there may be added benefits.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESULT_INCREDIBLE_DESCRIP: The skill performance was of such dazzling quality that, if appropriate to the task, it could become the subject of conversation for some time -it's at least worth writing home about. Gamemasters should dole out some significant bonuses for getting this large of a roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESULT_MINIMAL_DESCRIPTIO: The total was just barely enough.The character hardly succeeded at all, and only the most minimal effects apply. If "minimal effects" are not an option, then maybe the action took longer than normal to succeed.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESULT_SOLID_DESCRIPTION: The action was performed completely, but without frills.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESULT_SPECTACULAR_DESCRI: The performance of the action was deft and expert.  Observers would notice the ease or grace with which the action was performed (if applicable).
NONEX_IST_OD6S.RESULT_SUPERIOR_DESCRIPTI: It is almost certain that there are additional benefits to performing an action this well. The character performed the action better, faster, or more adeptly than expected.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.SCORE_TOO_LOW: Score is less than 1D, cannot roll.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.SKILL_MUST_BE_USED: This skill/specialization must be used before you can advance it.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.TOOLTIP_MERCHANT_VENDOR: Determines if this actor is a merchant/vendor, capable of selling items, or a basic container
NONEX_IST_OD6S.TOOLTIP_SHOW_IN_ACTOR_SID: Whether or not this actor will be visible to players in the sidebar.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.TOOLTIP_STARSHIP_WEAPON_C: Number of crew required to fire the weapon
NONEX_IST_OD6S.TOOLTIP_STARSHIP_WEAPON_S: Scale value of the weapon; if 0 then the scale of the starship will be used
NONEX_IST_OD6S.TOOLTIP_VEHICLE_WEAPON_CR: Number of crew required to fire the weapon
NONEX_IST_OD6S.TOOLTIP_VEHICLE_WEAPON_SC: Scale value of the weapon; if 0 then the scale of the vehicle will be used
NONEX_IST_OD6S.VEHICLE_COLLISION_MOD_HIN: Positive or minus modifier depending on the type of surface the vehicle collides with or other circumstances.  Something soft/yielding, -1D or more, etc.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.VERIFY_TRANSFER_CREW: This actor is already a crew member of a different vehicle.  Clicking OK will transfer the actor to a new vehicle.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_ACTOR_NOT_VEHICLE: The actor is not a vehicle.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_ADVANCE_GREATER_THAN: Cannot advance attribute beyond your species max.

Explosive is configured for 3 zones, not 4
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_INVALID_MACRO_ITEM: Invalid Item for creating a macro.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_INVALID_RANGE_ATTRIB: Character Attribute for weapon range does not exist.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_NO_CHARACTER_ASSIGNE: No Character is assigned to you.  Please assign a character before using the purchase button or drag the item from the merchant to your character sheet.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_NO_DICE_FOR_ZONE: At least one explosive zone has zero dice set in the explosive item.

NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_NO_ITEM_NAME: Your controlled actor has no item named
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_NOT_DELETING_ITEM_OW: Not deleting item from source actor as you are not an owner.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_NOT_ENOUGH_CURRENCY: Not enough currency to purchase the item.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_NOT_OWNED: You can only create macro buttons for owned Items
NONEX_IST_OD6S.OUT_OF_MELEE_BRAWL_RANGE: Your target is outside of melee/brawl range
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_SELECT_TARGET: Please select a target before rolling an attack.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WARN_SHEET_MODE_NOT_NORMA: Cannot roll when Sheet Mode is not Normal
NONEX_IST_OD6S.WEAPON_MUSCLE: The weapon adds the character's strength score to damage
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_MISC_RULES_DESCRIP: Customize miscellaneous rules for your game world.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIGHHITMULTIPLIER_: Configure what the threshold is for the optional damage range for your game world. default is 5 pips.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIGHHITPIPSORDICE_: Configure whether you use Pips or Dice for the optional damage for your game world. Off is pips, On is dice.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_HIGHHITROUND_DESCR: Optional rounding for near-threshold hits. 'down'(on) requires full threshold, 'up'(off) mean partial threshold suffices.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ADVANCECOSTATTRIBU: Customize the CP cost for Attributes for your game world. Default 10.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ADVANCECOSTSKILL_D: Customize the CP cost for Skills for your game world. Default 1.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ADVANCECOSTSKILL_M: Customize the CP cost for Metaphysics Skills for your game world. Default 2.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_ADVANCECOSTSPECIAL: Customize the CP cost for Specializations for your game world. Default 0.5.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RESISTANCE_OPTION: Skill instead of Strength for Damage Resistance
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RESISTANCE_OPTION_: Use a Skill instead of Strength for DR
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RESISTANCESKILL_DE: The skill to use for your Resistances instead of Strength for your game world if the above is checked.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RESISTANCEROUND_DE: Configure whether you round up or down for Resistance for your game world. Off is up, On is down.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_RESISTANCEMULTIPLI: Configure what the multiplier is use on Resistance for your game world. default is 1.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STRDAMSKILL_DESCRI: Customize what Skill is used for the Strength Damage Bonus for your game world. Default is 'Lift'
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STRDAMROUND_DESCRI: Configure whether you round up or down for Strength Damage Bonus for your game world. Off is up, On is down.
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_STRDAMMULTIPLIER_D: Configure what the multiplier is for the Strength Damage Bonus for your game world. default is 0.5 (half).
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_OD6BONUS: Use OD6 Strength Damage Bonus or Custom
NONEX_IST_OD6S.CONFIG_OD6BONUS_DESCRIPTI: Configure whether you the OD6 Strength Damage Bonus or use the custom Multiplier for your game world. Off is OD6, On is Custom.
